summary.original: Fetch a public URL and convert its main content to Markdown or return bounded raw HTML.
summary.zhCN: 读取公开网页并提取主要正文为 Markdown，也可在长度限制内返回原始 HTML。

description.original: A Model Context Protocol server providing tools to fetch and convert web content for usage by LLMs.
description.zhCN: 这是 Model Context Protocol 官方参考网页读取服务，可以抓取公开 HTTP/HTTPS 页面、提取主要正文并转换成 Markdown。Agent-OPT 在调用前额外拒绝本机、局域网、私有 IP、链路本地地址和带凭证 URL，并限制单次返回长度。

author.name: Model Context Protocol a Series of LF Projects, LLC.

evidence.note: PyPI metadata confirms identity, version, MIT license, Python requirement, release time, and official repository path.
Official README documents URL fetching, Markdown conversion, pagination fields, raw mode, robots behavior, and MIT licensing.
Repository license file supplies the applicable MIT text referenced by the component README.

license.evidence: PyPI metadata and the official component README both state MIT; Agent-OPT invokes the upstream package.

description.original: Fetch a public URL and simplify its main content into Markdown.
description.zhCN: 抓取公开 URL，并把主要内容清理为 Markdown。

description.original: Bound response length and continue from a later character index.
description.zhCN: 限制单次返回字符数，并从后续字符位置继续读取。

description.original: Return bounded raw HTML instead of simplified Markdown when explicitly requested.
description.zhCN: 用户明确选择时，在长度限制内返回原始 HTML。

notes: Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs without embedded credentials are accepted.
DNS results are checked against private, loopback, link-local, multicast, and reserved ranges before invocation.
Redirect-time DNS rebinding remains a residual risk and should be isolated further before enabling untrusted multi-tenant hosting.

requirements: Project virtual environment installed from requirements-mcp.txt

notes: High-value retrieval primitive with explicit response bounds and robots support.
Public URL validation substantially reduces SSRF exposure, but production multi-tenant deployment should add network-layer egress isolation.
Kept URL, HTTP/HTTPS, HTML, Markdown, DNS, SSRF, and robots.txt technically precise.

tests.evidence: Vitest launched mcp-server-fetch 2026.7.10 and extracted the real https://example.com page into simplified content.
Raw mode, a nonzero start index, a 180-character bound, truncation notice, and continuation offset were verified.
An unresolvable .invalid domain produced a controlled validation error instead of reaching upstream.
file URLs, localhost, loopback, cloud metadata link-local IPs, embedded credentials, and unresolvable domains were rejected.
Playwright chromium fetched https://example.com/, observed Example Domain, and confirmed localhost rejection in the error panel.
